---
name: Backlog item
about: Track bugs, enhancements, technical debt, and future product work
title: "[Backlog] "
labels: backlog
assignees: ""
---

## Type

- [ ] Bug
- [ ] Enhancement
- [ ] Technical debt
- [ ] Future feature
- [ ] Polish item

## Summary

Describe the problem or improvement clearly.

## Why it matters

Explain the product, engineering, or demo impact.

## Suggested approach

Outline a clean implementation direction if one is already known.

## Acceptance notes

- [ ] Behavior is clear
- [ ] Docs/env impact reviewed
- [ ] Role/demo impact reviewed if relevant
